valid.name: explicit-outer
never-bare-side-join
valid.code: SELECT a.id FROM a LEFT JOIN b ON a.id = b.id;

invalid.name: left-join

errors.message: Write `LEFT OUTER JOIN` explicitly instead of `LEFT JOIN`.
Write `RIGHT OUTER JOIN` explicitly instead of `RIGHT JOIN`.
Write `FULL OUTER JOIN` explicitly instead of `FULL JOIN`.

invalid.name: never-side-outer-join
invalid.code: SELECT a.id FROM a LEFT OUTER JOIN b ON a.id = b.id;

errors.message: Omit the redundant `OUTER`; use `LEFT JOIN` instead of `LEFT OUTER JOIN`.

invalid.output: SELECT a.id FROM a LEFT JOIN b ON a.id = b.id;
